commitMessage:
feat(tool): C# dotnet-tool successor to the PowerShell module

Ports the gscript substrate from PowerShell to a cross-platform C# dotnet
tool (dotnet tool install -g gscript), unifying the parallel ps1+sh
implementations into one canonical, dependency-free CLI so consumers stop
forking the template.

- Preflight gates: trailing-null, file-size-sanity, structured-file parse
  (JSON/XML/YAML + Razor CSS-comment scan; .ps1 via optional pwsh shell-out),
  markdown-line-count, and the localmd-sourced leak-check.
- Git layer: stale-lock auto-recovery, retry-with-backoff on lock collisions,
  PAT-in-URL auth (redacted from logs), divergence guard.
- CI watch with per-step transitions; post-deploy probe (redirect-off).
- localmd PAT + leak-pattern resolution.

First dogfood: this commit is pushed by the tool itself.
